case_title: SYNCHRONY BANK VS. VIOLI EDNILAO ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $324.40 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 18066035) AS TO DEFENDANT EDNILAO, VIOLI
